// ABOUT_ME.AI

Who Am I?

I am M. Fathima Nameera, a passionate first-year student of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at RD National College of Arts and Science, Erode, Tamil Nadu.

From a young age, coding has been more than a subject to me — it is a superpower. I believe AI is the future, and I am here to be part of shaping it. Every single day, I learn something new, and I don't plan on stopping.

My dream is to become a Google App Developer — and I am taking every step, certificate, and challenge as a move toward that goal. This portfolio is my first AI-assisted project, and it marks the beginning of an incredible journey.

🏸 When I'm not coding, you'll find me on the badminton court, channeling the same focus and agility I bring to every algorithm I write.

FULL NAMEM. Fathima Nameera

// KNOWLEDGE.HUB

Knowledge Hub

A curated collection of AI, tech & science topics I'm exploring daily.

🧠
Machine Learning Basics
Supervised vs Unsupervised learning, training datasets, overfitting, and how machines improve through data exposure — the foundation of every intelligent system.
AI FUNDAMENTALS
🔗
Neural Networks
How billions of virtual neurons fire signals to recognise patterns, understand language, and make decisions — inspired by the human brain itself.
DEEP LEARNING
🐍
Python for AI
Libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and scikit-learn form the backbone of data science. Python's simplicity makes it the #1 language for AI research worldwide.
PROGRAMMING
📊
Data Science Pipeline
From raw data collection to cleaning, visualisation, model training and deployment — the full journey from data to decision in the real world.
DATA SCIENCE
📱
Google App Development
My dream field. Android apps power over 3 billion devices. Learning Kotlin, APIs, Firebase, and how Google's ecosystem ties everything together.
MY DREAM
🗄️
SQL & Databases
Structured Query Language — the language every data professional must master. Queries, joins, normalisation, and how relational databases power every app.
DATABASES
⚡
Algorithms & DSA
Sorting, searching, recursion, trees, graphs — the mathematical heartbeat behind every efficient program. Mastering DSA = thinking like a computer.
CS FUNDAMENTALS
🌐
Web Development
HTML, CSS, and JavaScript form the trinity of the web. The very page you're reading is built with these tools — and I'm actively mastering them.
WEB TECH
🔒
Cybersecurity Basics
In an AI-driven world, security matters more than ever. Encryption, ethical hacking concepts, and how to build safe digital systems for the future.
SECURITY
